positive: A whimsical, high-contrast linework illustration featuring a group of forest animals (deer, foxes, owls, rabbits) gathering around a glowing stylized lantern. The scene should be composed vertically, emphasizing the silhouette of the animals against a deep nocturnal sky. Use an Art Deco or vintage storybook engraving style with thick, clean outlines and subtle dot-work cross-hatching for texture. Color palette is limited to rich indigo, creamy parchment, and metallic gold accents, ensuring maximum contrast for screen printing. The main light source is the lantern, casting dramatic, stylized shadows. Highly detailed, suitable for repeating patterns or single central placement on apparel.
negative: blur, grainy, watermark, signature, cropped, text, logo, messy, low detail, bad anatomy, extra limbs, ugly, poorly drawn
